extracted.title: 2026 Millennium Maintenance Schedule 4/2/2026
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Millennium Pipeline Company (MPC) hereby notifies customers that an update to the 2026 Construction and Maintenance Schedule has been posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website.

Please note changes to the Construction and Maintenance Schedule are indicated in red.

For more information, please contact the Customer Service Team at 1-866-581-6487.

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance
2026 Millennium Outage Schedule 04-02-26.pdf
